content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

January 13, 2003

Guy Evans, Incorporated
c/o Michael Bracken
72-009 Metroplex Drive
Thousand Palms, CA 92276

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-343

Dear Mr. Evans:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 The Commission is charged with interpreting and enforcing the provisions of the Act, and may provide advice only with respect to those provisions (section 83114). Your questions concern areas of the law outside the Act. Per our telephone conversation on January 10, 2003, you have agreed to withdraw your letter.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
GW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-02-343

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
